body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42997", "cvss": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-669", "name": "Incorrect Resource Transfer Between Spheres"}], "description": "An issue was discovered in idrac in OpenStack Ironic before 35.0.1. During import, a user invoking molds can request authorization to be sent to a remote endpoint. The credential forwarded is a time-limited Keystone token (which provides access to all OpenStack services Ironic is authorized for); or basic credentials configured for molds storage. The fixed versions are 26.1.6, 29.0.5, 32.0.1, and 35.0.1.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00433, "percentile": 0.35082}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-54w4-233h-x86g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-08T23:07:56Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-54w4-233h-x86g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-54w4-233h-x86g"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42997"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-05T19:16:22Z", "published_at": "2026-05-05T21:31:31Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42997", "https://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/05/10", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/05/10", "https://security.openstack.org/ossa/OSSA-2026-010.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-54w4-233h-x86g"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openstack/ironic-python-agent", "summary": "OpenStack Ironic has an Incorrect Resource Transfer Between Spheres", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T23:07:57Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-54w4-233h-x86g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "35.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "ironic-python-agent"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 33.0.0, < 35.0.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "32.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "ironic-python-agent"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 30.0.0, < 32.0.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "29.0.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "ironic-python-agent"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 27.0.0, < 29.0.5"}, {"first_patched_version": "26.1.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "ironic-python-agent"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 26.1.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
